task_completion.description: Create a draw.io file with two specific pages for the C4 model.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The draw.io interface should be visible with two page tabs at the bottom named 'System Context' and 'Container'.

task_completion.description: Add the required elements to the 'System Context' page with correct C4 color coding.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'System Context' page should show a blue box for the internal 'Internet Banking System', and gray boxes for external systems ('E-mail System' and 'Mainframe'). It should also include a 'Personal Banking Customer' element.

task_completion.description: Add the required elements to the 'Container' page with correct C4 shapes and color coding.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Container' page should show blue boxes for 'Web Application', 'Single-Page Application', 'Mobile App', and 'API Application'. The 'Database' must be represented as a blue cylinder shape.

task_completion.description: Include interactions and protocols between the containers.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Arrows connecting the elements in the 'Container' diagram, with text labels indicating the type of interaction and protocols (look for 'TCP' among the protocols).

task_completion.description: Save the draw.io diagram to the correct Desktop path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The draw.io window title should display 'c4_banking.drawio', or a file manager/terminal should show 'c4_banking.drawio' located on the Desktop.

task_completion.description: Export the 'System Context' page as a PNG image to the Desktop.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An export dialog in draw.io saving 'c4_banking.png', a success notification for the export, or a file manager showing 'c4_banking.png' on the Desktop.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the draw.io graphical interface to create the diagrams.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the draw.io application open with elements being dragged, dropped, or styled on the canvas, rather than a terminal script generating an XML file.

integrity.description: Verify the agent opened and read the provided requirements text file.
integrity.visual_evidence: A text editor (like gedit, nano, or cat in terminal) should be visible displaying the contents of 'c4_requirements.txt'.

integrity.description: Verify the PNG was exported using draw.io's built-in export feature.
integrity.visual_evidence: The 'File -> Export as -> PNG...' menu or the export configuration dialog in draw.io should be visible in the trajectory.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Requirements file: /home/ga/Desktop/c4_requirements.txt. Expected drawio file: /home/ga/Desktop/c4_banking.drawio. Expected PNG: /home/ga/Desktop/c4_banking.png. Container elements must exactly include: 'Web Application', 'Single-Page Application', 'Mobile App', 'API Application', and 'Database'. The context element for the customer should be specifically named 'Personal Banking Customer'. Interactions must include the 'TCP' protocol.
